category_sources: Official site https://lv2plug.in/ describes LV2 as an extensible open standard for audio plugins.
source_facts.description: Portable plugin standard for audio systems
display_name_sources: Official site https://lv2plug.in/ uses the LV2 name.
docs_sources: Official LV2 homepage has a Documentation section with specifications and developing links.
Official developing page https://lv2plug.in/pages/developing.html links to specifications and API reference.
repo_sources: Official LV2 site https://lv2plug.in/ links Repository to GitLab.
Official developing page gives git clone https://gitlab.com/lv2/lv2.git.
tags_sources: Official site https://lv2plug.in/ describes audio plugins, extensions, and specification documentation.
source_facts.description: Portable plugin standard for audio systems
